subject: Fermi GBM trigger 616776657/200718619 is not a GRB
body:
S. Poolakkil (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 616776657/200718619
at 14:50:52.41 UT on 18 July 2020, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to SGR 1806-20."
